slogan: Symbol of transforming weapons into words
ecosystem.promo_1: We offer the first edition of pens at a promotional, attractive price. This is an introductory offer, and as production expands, the price of future pieces may be higher. It's worth taking advantage of this unique opportunity before prices go up.
ecosystem.promo_2: Our goal is to develop the brand and create various editions that will appeal to enthusiasts of original, handcrafted accessories. They are perfect as a gift for military enthusiasts and people who appreciate unique items.
ecosystem.desc_1: Created from authentic, used .243 caliber shell casings that were once part of a fired cartridge. Each casing retains subtle marks of its history. These marks give the pen its unique character and soul.
ecosystem.desc_2: Each piece is handcrafted with attention to the smallest details. Precise processing, careful shell selection, and fine finishing make every pen one of a kind – perfect as a collectible item, original gift, or luxurious accessory for those who value items with soul.
ecosystem.desc_3: The entire construction is solid, durable, and noticeable in hand. It has a pleasant weight that gives a sense of quality and longevity, while also fitting comfortably in the hand. Writing with it is incredibly smooth and effortless, requiring little pressure, turning every note into a pleasure.
ecosystem.desc_4: Natural, raw shells that retain their original character and signs of use, or a version with shells polished to a high gloss for a more elegant and exclusive appearance.
ecosystem.desc_5: The pen allows slight personalization. By default, there's an external spacer between the two shells, which adds a distinctive look and extends the construction. However, if someone prefers a more compact form – the spacer can be easily removed, allowing the shells to touch directly, giving the pen a shorter, more raw look. A simple modification to match your style.
ecosystem.desc_6: The pen mechanism works by twisting the shell, causing the refill to extend or retract. When fully extended, a characteristic, subtle metal sound confirms it’s in its final position. Replacing the refill is just as easy – remove the rear shell, unscrew the used refill, and screw in a new one. This intuitive solution combines functionality with the unique nature of the pen.
ecosystem.tech_1: .243 caliber casings come from various manufacturers
contact_1: Write us an email and place an order for a pen!
message: quantity, variant (polished or raw), address and phone number for delivery
info: You will receive payment details by email, and after payment is made, confirmation.
setContents: 1 ballpoint pen – polished or raw variant + black refill + box
shippingAbroad: Ask for the delivery price to other countries!
title: Unique Pen
